title: Simple Realism
description: This Modpack Aims to Make Minecraft More Realistic!
body:
![Sunrise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6bbb183a340d00eca0293b9f9fc07384fd373a2.jpeg)
# Recommendations
We recommend using the PRO version of the [**Physics Mod**](https://minecraftphysicsmod.com/pro) for a better experience!

# Packs
- [**Patrix 32x**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/patrix-32x?hl=en-US)
- [**Round Trees**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/round-trees?hl=en-US)

# Install
- I recommend allocating additional ram for better performance. Go with 6-8GB of ram.

- Use a launcher to make installation easy! ([**Prism**](https://prismlauncher.org/download/windows/) or [**ATLauncher**](https://atlauncher.com/downloads))
